subject: Problem in Creating Initial Model in Helical Reconstruction
body:
Hi,
I am trying to create an initial model from a single 2D Class having the entire cross-over distance using the following commands…… 

relion_stack_create --i Select/job0xx/class_averages.star --o test/set8/smallclasses_box550 --ignore_optics

relion_image_handler --i test/set8/smallclasses_box550.mrcs --new_box 500 --o test/set8/smallclasses_box500.mrcs

cp test/set8/smallclasses_box550.star test/set8/smallclasses_box500.star

relion_helix_inimodel2d --i test/set8/smallclasses_box550.star --iter 5 --crossover_distance 800 --angpix 1.07 --o test/set8 --mask_diameter 490 --search_shift 3 --search_angle 1 --step_angle 1 --sym 1 --maxres 5 --j 24 

The reconstructed mrcs (_it005_reconstructed.mrcs) file looks fine. But the _class001_rec3d.mrc file is empty. So not able to use it for the later Class3D job as a reference map. Never had this issue when I used multiple classes for generating initial model. Is there a way to solve this? or is there a way I can use the _it005_reconstructed.mrcs as the reference map by converting the mrcs file to mrc? Appreciate your help in this regard. 

Thanks,
Victor
